response.original_title: Larnelle Harris: Live In Concert Fayetteville, NC
response.overview: On Veterans Day 1993, Grammy‑winning gospel tenor Larnelle Harris performed a special live concert in Fayetteville, North Carolina, near Fort Bragg, honoring the service members and families of the U.S. military community. Captured during the height of his early‑1990s career, the performance blends worship anthems, inspirational ballads, and patriotic tributes. Originally recorded for VHS and regional broadcast, the concert remains a rare snapshot of Harris’ powerful stage presence and ministry.
response.title: Larnelle Harris: Live In Concert Fayetteville, NC
